title: euphorbia obovata
intro: Euphorbia obovata, also known as the Cushion Bush, is a succulent plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its rounded, cushion-like shape and small, white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia obovata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Euphorbia obovata is typically prepared for herbal use through the extraction of its sap or leaves, which can be made into ointments, salves, or infusions.
